name: Exponent Calculator
desc: Exponent Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
seo_description: Use our free exponent calculator to quickly estimate result based on base, exponente. Not registration needed.

range_hints.exponente: Small powers: 2-10; Large: 10-100; Avoid very large to prevent overflow

result_context: The result ({result}) is the base multiplied by itself exponent times, representing exponential growth or repeated multiplication.
formula_display: Result = Base ^ Exponente = Base × Base ×... (Exponente times)
mistakes: Multiplying base by exponent instead of repeated multiplication
Not understanding that exponent 0 always equals 1 (for non-zero base)
